name: Anime
description: Anime dialogue clips, expressive Japanese speech with varied pitch and speed.
descriptionBullets: Scoring: CER + First Latency + LBL + UPL

name: Car-TTS Clean
description: Clean TTS audio from NanamiDragon + MasaruDragon voices.
descriptionBullets: Scoring: CER + First Latency + LBL + UPL

name: Car-TTS Denoise Human
description: TTS audio with denoised human-voice interference at SNR=10.
descriptionBullets: TTS + human-voice noise SNR=10, then denoised
Tests ASR robustness on processed noisy audio
Scoring: CER + First Latency + LBL + UPL

name: Car-TTS Denoise NonHuman
description: TTS audio with denoised non-human noise at SNR=10.
descriptionBullets: TTS + non-human noise SNR=10, then denoised
Tests ASR robustness on processed noisy audio
Scoring: CER + First Latency + LBL + UPL

name: Car-TTS Noise Human
description: TTS audio mixed with human-voice interference noise at SNR=10.
descriptionBullets: Scoring: CER + First Latency + LBL + UPL

name: Car-TTS Noise NonHuman
description: TTS audio mixed with non-human noise at SNR=10.
descriptionBullets: Scoring: CER + First Latency + LBL + UPL

name: Kiritan
description: Japanese speech from Kiritan corpus with reference text.
descriptionBullets: Scoring: CER + First Latency + LBL + UPL
